text:
If OpenAI models were to match Claude’s design quality it would game over for general agent tasks.

The interface is perfect for knowledge work but the designs are always mid at best.

When referring to the AI labs it's now "MOGMAX"

Meta
OpenAI
Google
MSFT
Anthropic
spaceX

*MSFT included for namemaxxing purposes.

Thing is, this applies to every role, not just receptionists.

And it’s exactly why you need an audit before you start any AI transformation. If you don’t understand how the operation actually runs today, you have no chance of automating it.

It’s why we built Varick Agents

RT @alex_prompter: I just broke down the anatomy of the perfect SOUL. md file for AI agents.

SOUL. md is the identity file every AI agent…

We’ve reached the era of 4 minute AI movies that are watchable.

And they don’t look like traditional Hollywood.

The production quality isn’t perfect (Dario turns into a generic Chad at points) - but it doesn’t matter.

The story is tailor-made to entertain a niche audience.

Another great example.

Hollywood would never make this - and couldn’t do it in time for this to still be relevant - but millions of people will watch here on X.

https://t.co/xG98nBzrKX

People and sea lions of San Francisco
